name: webpack-i18n-assets-plugin
description: Webpack 5 plugin that inlines i18n translation strings into production bundles and generates per-locale asset files in a single build pass.
when_to_use: Webpack 5 plugin that inlines i18n translation strings into production bundles and generates per-locale asset files in a single build pass
avoid: Not for development-mode translation. Not for Webpack 4 projects. Only supports string literal i18n keys, not template strings.
not_for: Not for development-mode translation. Not for Webpack 4 projects. Only supports string literal i18n keys, not template strings.

name: webpack-i18n-assets-plugin
description: Webpack 5 plugin that inlines i18n localization texts into production bundles and generates per-locale asset files in a single build pass. Replaces i18n function calls with resolved strings at build time, supporting parameters, pluralization, and custom import/declaration resolvers.
when_to_use: Generating per-locale production JS bundles in a single webpack build
Inlining i18n strings into the bundle to avoid runtime translation lookups
Using @gravity-ui/i18n and wanting build-time translation resolution
When you need per-locale assets manifests for server-side locale-aware static file serving
avoid: Only works for production builds — do not rely on it for development-mode translation
Supports only string literals as i18n keys — template strings and variable keys are not supported
Requires Webpack 5; Webpack 4 is not supported
how_to_use: Install with `npm install -D @gravity-ui/webpack-i18n-assets-plugin`. In webpack.config.js add `new I18nAssetsPlugin({ locales })` to plugins and use `[locale]` in the output filename. Alternatively use `applyPluginToWebpackConfig(config, { locales })` to also attach WebpackAssetsManifest for per-locale manifests. Customize with `importResolver`, `declarationResolver`, and `replacer` options for non-gravity-i18n libraries.

options.locales: Required. Object mapping locale codes to translation key-value maps.
options.importResolver: Optional. Function to identify which imports are i18n functions.
options.declarationResolver: Optional. Function to identify which variable declarations are i18n helpers.
options.replacer: Optional. Function that returns the replacement string for each i18n call.
options.collectUnusedKeys: Optional boolean. When true, writes unused-keys.json after build (default: false).
